package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for context_withvalue_used_for_dependencies_or_large_payloads: context.WithValue used for dependency-like objects or payload-like data instead of lightweight request metadata.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: context; severity: warning.
type Rule239PositiveRecord struct {
	Name string
}

func scenario239Positive(ctx context.Context, value Rule239PositiveRecord) context.Context {
	return context.WithValue(ctx, "dependency", value)
}
